# acceptShares

**Instance Method**

Accepts a share—that is represented by a `shortGUID`—on behalf of the current user.

## Declaration

```swift
Promise<CloudKit.RecordInfosResponse, CKError> acceptShares(
	String[] shortGUIDs
);
```

## Parameters

- **shortGUIDs**: One or more short GUIDs that represent shared records.

## Return Value

A `Promise` object that resolves to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.RecordInfosResponse] object, or rejects to a [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object.

## Accepting Shared Records

- **fetchRecordInfos**: Returns information about a record for which you have a `shortGUID` property.
